name: OpenPhone Business Phone API
what_it_does: OpenPhone API for modern business phone system designed for startups and small teams. Enables programmatic access to calls, SMS/MMS messages, contacts, and voicemails. OpenPhone is popular with startups for its simplicity and integrations with Zapier, Salesforce, and HubSpot.
use_cases: Querying call and SMS history from small business communications agents
Sending automated SMS follow-ups from sales workflow automation agents
Retrieving voicemail transcriptions from customer service automation agents
Syncing OpenPhone contacts with CRM tools from sales pipeline agents
not_for: Large enterprise contact center operations (OpenPhone is SMB-focused)
High-volume A2P SMS campaigns (OpenPhone is for small team conversations)
Complex IVR and call routing requirements
best_when: A startup or small team using OpenPhone wants AI agents to automate SMS follow-ups, log calls to CRM, and transcribe voicemails — without complex enterprise telephony setup.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade contact center features. OpenPhone is optimized for small teams. PRIVACY: Call recordings and SMS messages contain customer data.

auth.notes: OpenPhone API key authentication. Keys generated in OpenPhone account settings. Webhook verification for incoming events.

pricing.notes: OpenPhone subscription required. API access included with Business plan and above.

performance.rate_limits: OpenPhone API rate limits not prominently documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Call recordings and SMS messages are customer communication data
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API only available on Business plan and above
US and Canada phone numbers only
SMS sending rate limits apply — batch messaging requires planning
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer call recordings and SMS messages. SOC2 certified. HTTPS enforced. API key must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer call and SMS data. SOC2 certified. US/Canada only. API key security required.
